training_status: Recreational; rucking, kettlebells, tire sledgehammer work, assault bike, 20-30 min up to 3x/week

benefits.description: Sleeping much more deeply since starting CJC-1295/ipamorelin
Good body recomposition including muscle gain on tirzepatide, confirmed by body scans
Fat loss on tirzepatide confirmed by body scans; clothes fitting better suggesting continued fat loss despite scale stall
Strength is improving since adding CJC-1295/ipamorelin

side_effects.description: Flushing experienced after starting CJC-1295/ipamorelin, mostly resolved
Gained more than 3 lbs, weight stalled around 285-286 lbs for two weeks; discouraging and unexpected

protocol_notes: Doctor-supervised protocol. Started tirzepatide in November at 324 lbs, now 283 lbs. Doctor recommended adding CJC-1295 + ipamorelin to enhance body recomposition. Currently in medical school, limited training time. Questioning whether activity level is sufficient to justify peptide cost/use, or whether to wait until more weight is lost.
